questions.question: What is the primary purpose of Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) in R?
options: A) To visualize data for publication
B) To model relationships between variables
C) To summarize data for decision-making
questions.explanation: Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) is used to summarize and explore data in R to gain insights and make informed decisions.

questions.question: Which R package is used for creating pie charts?
questions.explanation: The base graphics package in R is used for creating pie charts.

questions.question: What type of plot is used to show the relationship between two continuous variables?
questions.explanation: Scatter plots are used to visualize the relationship between two continuous variables.

questions.question: Which of the following plots is used to show the distribution of a single variable?
questions.explanation: Histograms are used to show the distribution of a single variable.

questions.question: What type of plot is used to compare the distribution of two groups?
questions.explanation: Box plots are used to compare the distribution of two groups.
